observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with fiber loss
Visual pattern suggesting missing fiber area
Localized deviation from normal carpet appearance
mechanism_explanation: Mechanical wear or defect in weaving causes loss of material in a localized area.
severity_visual_description: critical missing fiber area visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Adjust loom tension and inspect weaving needles.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the missing fiber area would be absent and surface appears normal.
